scripts.build: docker exec fastify_app nubx tsc && docker exec fastify_app nubx tsc-alias && docker cp fastify_app:/app/dist ./dist
scripts.db:generate: docker exec fastify_drizzle_studio nubx drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: docker exec fastify_drizzle_studio node_modules/.bin/drizzle-kit migrate && docker exec -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:password@postgres:5432/fastify_test fastify_drizzle_studio node_modules/.bin/drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.lint: docker exec fastify_app nubx eslint src
scripts.lint:fix: docker exec fastify_app nubx eslint src --fix
scripts.test:unit: docker exec -e NODE_ENV=test fastify_app nubx vitest run
scripts.db:seed: docker exec fastify_app nubx tsx src/db/seed.ts
